_publications._publicationTitle: HIF1α-dependent induction of the mitochondrial chaperone TRAP1 regulates bioenergetic adaptations to hypoxia.

_contextSnippet: By using a Zebrafish GFP reporter line, we measured a high transcriptional activity of HIF1α in the early stages of embryonic development, which strongly decreased at 4–5 dpf
details: High transcriptional activity of HIF1α in early stages of embryonic development, strongly decreased at 4-5 dpf
